title: Cox's Bazar Beach Escape
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Cox's Bazar, check-in, evening beach walk at Laboni Beach
Day 2: Full day Inani Beach & Himchhari Falls, local seafood dinner
Day 3: Day trip to Saint Martin Island by speedboat
Day 4: Ramu Buddhist Temple, local market, sunset at Cox's Bazar beach
Day 5: Morning beach walk, depart

title: Sajek Valley Clouds & Culture
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Dhaka to Sajek via Khagrachhari, arrive at Ruiilui Para, sunset view
Day 2: Morning cloud sea, Konglak Para trek, tribal village visit
Day 3: Sunrise photography, return journey

title: Bandarban Hills & Waterfalls
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Bandarban, Nilgiri Hills visit, overnight at Nilgiri
Day 2: Boga Lake trek (challenging), overnight near Boga
Day 3: Nafakhum Waterfall hike, local tribal village
Day 4: Return to Bandarban town, depart

title: Sylhet Tea & Waterfalls
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, Jaflong river & stone collection, Tamabil border
Day 2: Ratargul Swamp Forest boat tour, Bichanakandi crystal water
Day 3: Tea garden visit, Shahjalal Shrine, depart

title: Sundarbans Tiger Territory
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Depart Mongla by houseboat, Harbaria eco-center, evening on river
Day 2: Kotka wildlife zone, tiger track walk with guide, bird watching
Day 3: Hiron Point lighthouse, Dolphin Point, return journey

title: Maldives Luxury Escape
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Male, speedboat to resort, check-in overwater bungalow
Day 2: Snorkeling at house reef, sunset dolphin cruise
Day 3: Whale shark excursion, spa afternoon
Day 4: Local island visit, cultural experience, beach bonfire
Day 5: Morning dive, depart

title: Thailand Temples & Islands
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Bangkok, Wat Pho & Grand Palace
Day 2: Floating markets, Chatuchak Weekend Market
Day 3: Fly to Phuket, Patong Beach
Day 4: Phi Phi Islands full day boat tour
Day 5: Fly to Chiang Mai, Night Bazaar
Day 6: Elephant sanctuary, Doi Suthep Temple
Day 7: Return to Bangkok, depart

title: Bali Spirit & Surf
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Denpasar, transfer to Ubud, rice terrace walk
Day 2: Ubud Monkey Forest, Tegalalang Rice Terraces, Kecak fire dance
Day 3: Mount Batur sunrise trek
Day 4: Tanah Lot sunset, move to Seminyak
Day 5: Seminyak Beach, surf lesson, beach clubs
Day 6: Uluwatu cliffs, farewell dinner, depart

title: Nepal Everest Base Camp Trek
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Kathmandu, Thamel exploration
Day 2: Fly to Lukla, trek to Phakding
Day 3: Trek to Namche Bazaar (acclimatization)
Day 4: Acclimatization hike, Sherpa culture museum
Day 5: Trek to Tengboche Monastery
Day 6: Trek to Dingboche
Day 7: Reach Everest Base Camp (5,364m)
Day 8: Return to Lukla, fly to Kathmandu

title: Sajek Spring Blossoms
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Dhaka to Sajek, evening blossom trail walk
Day 2: Bamboo forest trek, wildflower photography
Day 3: Morning mist walk, return journey

title: Sylhet Winter Mist Tour
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Misty tea garden morning walk, Srimangal tea tasting
Day 2: Lawachara National Park, wildlife spotting, Madhabpur Lake
Day 3: Hakaluki Haor, migratory birds, depart

title: Dubai Glitz & Desert
itinerary_summary: Day 1: Arrive Dubai, Dubai Mall & Burj Khalifa At the Top
Day 2: Palm Jumeirah, Atlantis water park
Day 3: Desert Safari — dune bashing, camel ride, BBQ dinner
Day 4: Gold Souk, Spice Souk, Abra (water taxi) to Bur Dubai
Day 5: Dubai Frame, City Walk, depart
